case_title: FIELDWIRE LABS, INC. VS. EVAN CASEY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REST OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIELDWIRE LABS, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FIELDWIRE LABS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CASEY, EVAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-08-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE JAVED SINGHA, CHIEF OPERATIONAL OFFICER FOR FIELDWIRE LABS, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT EVAN CASEY. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON: 4/19/2017. AS TO DEFENDANT CASEY, EVAN
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIELDWIRE LABS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CASEY, EVAN
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-08-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-05-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $51.00) SERVED SEP-30-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CASEY, EVAN
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY FIELDWIRE LABS, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2016 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIELDWIRE LABS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CASEY, EVAN
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR (SC-109) FOR JAVED SINGHA FOR FIELDWIRE LABS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIELDWIRE LABS, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIELDWIRE LABS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIELDWIRE LABS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASEY, EVAN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $116.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,116.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $225.66 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT CASEY, EVAN
